theme_identity.name: Underground Tuner Social
theme_identity.description: A dark-mode-first social platform for car enthusiasts. Think 'Need for Speed' UI meets Facebook usability. High contrast, sharp edges, and magma orange accents against deep asphalt backgrounds.

typography.import_instruction: Import 'Chakra Petch' (weights 400, 500, 600, 700) and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css

usage_rules.background: Use zinc-950 (#09090b) as the global background. Never use pure black (#000000).
usage_rules.brand_color: Use #FF5722 (Magma Orange) for primary actions, active states, and key highlights. Do NOT overuse it; let it pop against the dark theme.
usage_rules.gradients: Avoid complex gradients. Use subtle linear gradients for button hovers (e.g., Orange-500 to Orange-600).
usage_rules.text: Headings are always White (#fafafa). Body text is Zinc-400 (#a1a1aa) to reduce eye strain.

buttons.base: font-chakra font-bold uppercase tracking-wider transition-all duration-200

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-sm text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/10

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlays on large dark backgrounds to prevent banding and add 'grit'.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use 'shadow-orange-glow' (custom class) for active elements: box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255, 87, 34, 0.4).
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders with low opacity (white/10) to define structure without clutter.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide-React icons. Stroke width: 1.5px for elegance, 2px for active states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'sonner' for toast notifications if not present.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and font families.
Create a 'Layout' component that enforces the dark theme background min-h-screen.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
Use the provided image URLs for mock data/placeholders.
Implement the 'Chakra Petch' font for all headings (h1-h6) and 'Inter' for body.
For the Wallet page, strictly follow the screenshot layout: Orange balance card on top, grid of amounts below.
For Login, use the provided parking lot image as a side-panel or background with overlay.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds, only for subtle button states.
Do NOT center text by default; use left alignment for body text.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
All buttons must have a hover state transformation (scale-105 or brightness-110).
Use 'backdrop-blur' carefully; only for sticky navs and modals.
